TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Juan_Manuel_Santos, title = Juan_Manuel_Santos, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Santos} }

S.FORM: = Juan Manuel Santos = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 8 jiyax 10 ka Juan Manuel Santos ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Columbia ta sayang o kiya ka Juan Manuel Santos, pnaah hngkawas 2010 idas 8 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n (kngkawas 1951 idas 8 diyax 10Ôľć), Colombia Seyji Jnwu, keyjay sweycya, brah Soto Colombia (kngkawas 2010 idas 8 diyax 7Ôľćkngkawas 2018 idas 8 diyax 7, kngkawas 2016 cida mnangal snadu Nobel Mpsblayaq. KndusanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Kngkawas 1951 idas 8 diyax 10, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mniq soto Colombia alang mkbrnux Bogot√° mntuting, mnmuyas Pyasan Tubaraw Sri Bogot√° mi Colegio San Carlos Sweyweyn. Bukuy daw Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u alaw musa pcaping Colombia Heytay Tucilung kiya mi wada thdil muyas dhuq Pyasan Heytay Tucilung Sweyweyn Cartagena, kngkawas 1969 daw wada mnhdu muyas. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mnhdu muyas daw musa America Pyasan Tubeyhing Kansas, kngkawas 1973 cida wada mangal Qmlahang Keyjay Sweys Sweywey, bukuy daw musa London muyas Pyasan London Sweyweyn Seyji Keyjay, kngkawas 1975 cida wada mangal Pkrana Keyjayswey Swos Sweywey. Kiya Dungan u tbrinah America, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Harvard John F. Kennedy Seyhu Sweyweyn muyas Kongkong Kwanri Swos, kngkawas 1981 cida mnhdu muyas. Mnhdu muyas daw, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mniq 1981 cida muda Fulbright Keykaku musa Pyasan Tubeyhing Tufts ngalan homung sweyce, kngkawas 1988 daw wada mPyasan Tubeyhing Harvard Nieman na Sweyce. Kndusan niya SeyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Kngkawas 1991, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa ngalan Colombia Mquri Nganguc Mawyibu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2000, ngalan Caycng Mi Kongkong Sintaybu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2005 cida, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u phiyu Colombia Minjoku Dankeycu Syakay Tang, kiya mi dhuq mangal dnkuhan Soto Alvaro Uribe V√©lez, Minjoku Dankeycu Syakay Tang pa wada mCcng Tang, kiya mi tuhuy Pawso Tang msupu Mkcka Mquri Narac Ccng Ryeynmong. Kngkawas 2006 dhuq kngkawas 2009 cida, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u ngalan Kwohwangbu Bucyo. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Kngkawas 2010 cida, alaw Tubaraw Balay Hoying u ptbrinah snburah keyngpo, ngalan Soto cida ka Uribe u uka brahan spuda snburah keyngpo muda mntxal lmutuc qpahun Soto, so kiya daw Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u ngalan Ccng Tang Minjoku Dankeycu Syakay Tang na hosweynjn tumal Colombia Soto seyngkyo, kiya u wada mndungus bay mbiyax mangal Soto. Brah Soto Uribe pa alaw ini qqaras Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n ka mquri Tukcka Pay, kiya mi hantay Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n tuhuy Ucwang Butay mi Yocituy FARC muda psdhu kari, kiya u psli nanaq Tunarac Cngtang Mincu Congsin. Kngkawas 2014 idas 6 cida, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mniq Soto seyngkyotumn2 meytaq hyo cida u mndungus bay mbiyax mangal lmutuc Soto, wada niya ini baka ka Tunarac Pay Cngtang Mincu Congsin Tang na hosweynjn. Kngkawas 2016 idas 6 diyax 23, hantay seyhu pnsliyan ucwang Colombia Keming Ucwang Riryang-Jnmincyun tuhuy Soto Colombia Juan Manuel Santos mniq Havana pbatas Patas Pnsdhuwan Mhdu Mccbu, ana so kasi ka spuda kongto muda smruwa, binaw ndanan dha niyi pa wada mnhdu mk50 knkawas na kcka qnlhangan mccbu. Idas 8 diyax 24 cida, seyhu Colombia u tuhuy Colombia Keming Ucwang Riryang mniq sotu Cuba alang mkbrnux Havana mnhdu nhdan bay knkana Pnsdhuwan Psblayaq, patas pnsdhuwan pa kiya ka knkana mnhdu mccbu, knpriyux ka alang pnwalang, ptkimax pbari iyu doku, wada pltadal na Yocituyweyn u malu tumal seyji, phiyu kwotusing Shwa ciko uri, Kongmin meytaq hyo u pniqan idas 10 diyax 2. Binaw kongto cida u hantay ka 50.22% hyo, wada so snklwiyan ini pdayi, ini balay pntna mnuda mintyaw cida ka so niyi. Ana so kiya u, mntna kngkawas idas 10 diyax 7, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u ida wada mangal snadu Nobel Mpsblayaq. Bukuy daw mnangal niya pila u wada niya subway Kcka Mccbu Colombia mqraqil niya. Malix Soto dawŚćłšĽĽŚĺĆ Kngkawas 2021 idas 6 diyax 11, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n mniq Qnlhangan Balay Bay Yingkay kaygi cida, dmurun mniq kngkawas 2002 dhuq kngkawas 2008 iyax cida (Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u mniq bukuy iyax ngalan Kwohwangbu Bucyo) alaw heytay "Smipaq Malu Mi Mqbling Mdungus" kiya u wada phqilan ka hmrinas mkpiya knmaxal bukuy sediq, so psrwanun tnsapah dha ka qnnaqah ndanan niyi. TnsapahŚģ∂Śļ≠ Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa tntuting 1 niqan bay hnhangan tnsapah mi llutucdha. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n na tnswayi tama rudan niya ka Eduardo Santos u mnmniq kngkawas 1938 dhuq kngkawas 1942 ngalan Soto Colombia, kiya mi mnhiya ka "El Tiempo" pusu balay singbung qnlhangan dha. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa tama niya Enrique Santos Castillo u nngalan singbung kiya pyeynci hmrinas 50 knkawas. Mnswayi niya Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n ka Enrique Santos Calder√≥n u ngalan syoning singbung kiya mk10 knkawas da, dhuq singbung kiya u mniq kngkawas 2007 cida sbari Spain na Planeta Kojyo. Kiya u Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n na laqi tnswayi niya ka Francisco Santos Calder√≥n u mniq Uribe Seyhu cida ngalan Huku Soto (kngkawas 2002-2010). Kngkawas 1987 cida Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u tuhuy Pingmyeyn Seykeys Mar√≠a Clemencia Rodr√≠guez M√ļnera msturung. Ddha dha u tnquli 3 laqi: Mart√≠n, Mar√≠a Antonia mi Esteban. Pnyahan pnatas Lituk Teymu
S.PHON: = …üuan manu…ôl santos = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka …üuan manu…ôl santos ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ¶olumbia ta sajaŇč o kija ka …üuan manu…ôl santos, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), ¶olombia s…ô…üi …ünwu, k…ô…üaj sw…ô ¶ja, b…ĺańß soto ¶olombia (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mnaŇčal snadu nob…ôl mpsblajaq. kndusan** kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa mniq soto ¶olombia alaŇč mkb…ĺnux bogot* mntutiŇč, mnmujas pjasan tuba…ĺaw s…ĺi bogot* mi ¶ol…ôgio san ¶a…ĺlos sw…ôw…ôn. bukuj daw …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u alaw musa p ¶apiŇč ¶olombia ńß…ôtaj tu ¶iluŇč kija mi wada tńßdil mujas dńßuq pjasan ńß…ôtaj tu ¶iluŇč sw…ôw…ôn ¶a…ĺtag…ôna, kŇčkawas **** daw wada mnńßdu mujas. …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa mnńßdu mujas daw musa am…ô…ĺi ¶a pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč kansas, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida wada maŇčal qmlańßaŇč k…ô…üaj sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô, bukuj daw musa london mujas pjasan london sw…ôw…ôn s…ô…üi k…ô…üaj, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida wada maŇčal pk…ĺana k…ô…üajsw…ô swos sw…ôw…ô. kija duŇčan u tb…ĺinańß am…ô…ĺi ¶a, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ńßa…ĺ*a…ĺd …üońßn *. k…ônn…ôdj s…ôńßu sw…ôw…ôn mujas koŇčkoŇč kwan…ĺi swos, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mnńßdu mujas. mnńßdu mujas daw, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa mniq **** ¶ida muda *ulb…ĺigńßt k…ôkaku musa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč tu*ts Ňčalan ńßomuŇč sw…ô ¶…ô, kŇčkawas **** daw wada mpjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ńßa…ĺ*a…ĺd ni…ôman na sw…ô ¶…ô. kndusan nija s…ô…üi**** kŇčkawas ****, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa Ňčalan ¶olombia mqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ mawjibu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas ****, Ňčalan ¶aj ¶Ňč mi koŇčkoŇč sintajbu bu ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u pńßiju ¶olombia min…üoku dank…ô ¶u sjakaj taŇč, kija mi dńßuq maŇčal dnkuńßan soto al*a…ĺo u…ĺib…ô **l…ô*, min…üoku dank…ô ¶u sjakaj taŇč pa wada m ¶ ¶Ňč taŇč, kija mi tuńßuj pawso taŇč msupu mk ¶ka mqu…ĺi na…ĺa ¶ ¶ ¶Ňč …ĺj…ônmoŇč. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u Ňčalan kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo. soto** kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, alaw tuba…ĺaw balaj ńßojiŇč u ptb…ĺinańß snbu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo, Ňčalan soto ¶ida ka u…ĺib…ô u uka b…ĺańßan spuda snbu…ĺańß k…ôŇčpo muda mntxal lmutu ¶ qpańßun soto, so kija daw …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u Ňčalan ¶ ¶Ňč taŇč min…üoku dank…ô ¶u sjakaj taŇč na ńßosw…ôn…ün tumal ¶olombia soto s…ôŇčkjo, kija u wada mnduŇčus baj mbijax maŇčal soto. b…ĺańß soto u…ĺib…ô pa alaw ini qqa…ĺas …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n ka mqu…ĺi tuk ¶ka paj, kija mi ńßantaj …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n tuńßuj u ¶waŇč butaj mi jo ¶ituj *a…ĺ ¶ muda psdńßu ka…ĺi, kija u psli nanaq tuna…ĺa ¶ ¶ŇčtaŇč min ¶u ¶oŇčsin. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa mniq soto s…ôŇčkjotumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida u mnduŇčus baj mbijax maŇčal lmutu ¶ soto, wada nija ini baka ka tuna…ĺa ¶ paj ¶ŇčtaŇč min ¶u ¶oŇčsin taŇč na ńßosw…ôn…ün. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńßantaj s…ôńßu pnslijan u ¶waŇč ¶olombia k…ômiŇč u ¶waŇč …ĺi…ĺjaŇč-…ünmin ¶jun tuńßuj soto ¶olombia …üuan manu…ôl santos mniq ńßa*ana pbatas patas pnsdńßuwan mńßdu m ¶ ¶bu, ana so kasi ka spuda koŇčto muda sm…ĺuwa, binaw ndanan dńßa niji pa wada mnńßdu mk** knkawas na k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan m ¶ ¶bu. idas * dijax ** ¶ida, s…ôńßu ¶olombia u tuńßuj ¶olombia k…ômiŇč u ¶waŇč …ĺi…ĺjaŇč mniq sotu ¶uba alaŇč mkb…ĺnux ńßa*ana mnńßdu nńßdan baj knkana pnsdńßuwan psblajaq, patas pnsdńßuwan pa kija ka knkana mnńßdu m ¶ ¶bu, knp…ĺijux ka alaŇč pnwalaŇč, ptkimax pba…ĺi iju doku, wada pltadal na jo ¶itujw…ôn u malu tumal s…ô…üi, pńßiju kwotusiŇč sńßwa ¶iko u…ĺi, koŇčmin m…ôtaq ńßjo u pniqan idas ** dijax *. binaw koŇčto ¶ida u ńßantaj ka **.**% ńßjo, wada so snklwijan ini pdaji, ini balaj pntna mnuda mintjaw ¶ida ka so niji. ana so kija u, mntna kŇčkawas idas ** dijax *, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u ida wada maŇčal snadu nob…ôl mpsblajaq. bukuj daw mnaŇčal nija pila u wada nija subwaj k ¶ka m ¶ ¶bu ¶olombia mq…ĺaqil nija. malix soto daw*** kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n mniq qnlńßaŇčan balaj baj jiŇčkaj kajgi ¶ida, dmu…ĺun mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ijax ¶ida (…üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u mniq bukuj ijax Ňčalan kwońßwaŇčbu bu ¶jo) alaw ńß…ôtaj "smipaq malu mi mqbliŇč mduŇčus" kija u wada pńßqilan ka ńßm…ĺinas mkpija knmaxal bukuj s…ôdiq, so ps…ĺwanun tnsapańß dńßa ka qnnaqańß ndanan niji. tnsapańß** …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa tntutiŇč * niqan baj ńßnńßaŇčan tnsapańß mi llutu ¶dńßa. …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n na tnswaji tama …ĺudan nija ka …ôdua…ĺdo santos u mnmniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan soto ¶olombia, kija mi mnńßija ka "…ôl ti…ômpo" pusu balaj siŇčbuŇč qnlńßaŇčan dńßa. …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n pa tama nija …ôn…ĺiqu…ô santos ¶astillo u nŇčalan siŇčbuŇč kija pj…ôn ¶i ńßm…ĺinas ** knkawas. mnswaji nija …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n ka …ôn…ĺiqu…ô santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u Ňčalan sjoniŇč siŇčbuŇč kija mk** knkawas da, dńßuq siŇčbuŇč kija u mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida sba…ĺi spain na plan…ôta ko…üjo. kija u …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n na laqi tnswaji nija ka *…ĺan ¶is ¶o santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u mniq u…ĺib…ô s…ôńßu ¶ida Ňčalan ńßuku soto (kŇčkawas ****-****). kŇčkawas **** ¶ida …üuan manu…ôl santos ¶ald…ô…ĺ*n u tuńßuj piŇčmj…ôn s…ôk…ôs ma…ĺ*a ¶l…ôm…ôn ¶ia …ĺod…ĺ*gu…ô* m*n…ô…ĺa mstu…ĺuŇč. ddńßa dńßa u tnquli * laqi: ma…ĺt*n, ma…ĺ*a antonia mi …ôst…ôban. pnjańßan pnatas lituk t…ômu
S.FORM: = Juan Manuel Santos = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 8 jiyax 10 ka Juan Manuel Santos ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Columbia ta sayang o kiya ka Juan Manuel Santos, pnaah hngkawas 2010 idas 8 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n (kngkawas 1951 idas 8 diyax 10Ôľć), Colombia Seyji Jnwu, keyjay sweycya, brah Soto Colombia (kngkawas 2010 idas 8 diyax 7Ôľćkngkawas 2018 idas 8 diyax 7, kngkawas 2016 cida mnangal snadu Nobel Mpsblayaq. KndusanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Kngkawas 1951 idas 8 diyax 10, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mniq soto Colombia alang mkbrnux Bogot√° mntuting, mnmuyas Pyasan Tubaraw Sri Bogot√° mi Colegio San Carlos Sweyweyn. Bukuy daw Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u alaw musa pcaping Colombia Heytay Tucilung kiya mi wada thdil muyas dhuq Pyasan Heytay Tucilung Sweyweyn Cartagena, kngkawas 1969 daw wada mnhdu muyas. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mnhdu muyas daw musa America Pyasan Tubeyhing Kansas, kngkawas 1973 cida wada mangal Qmlahang Keyjay Sweys Sweywey, bukuy daw musa London muyas Pyasan London Sweyweyn Seyji Keyjay, kngkawas 1975 cida wada mangal Pkrana Keyjayswey Swos Sweywey. Kiya Dungan u tbrinah America, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Harvard John F. Kennedy Seyhu Sweyweyn muyas Kongkong Kwanri Swos, kngkawas 1981 cida mnhdu muyas. Mnhdu muyas daw, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mniq 1981 cida muda Fulbright Keykaku musa Pyasan Tubeyhing Tufts ngalan homung sweyce, kngkawas 1988 daw wada mPyasan Tubeyhing Harvard Nieman na Sweyce. Kndusan niya SeyjiśĒŅś≤ĽÁĒüś∂Į Kngkawas 1991, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa ngalan Colombia Mquri Nganguc Mawyibu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2000, ngalan Caycng Mi Kongkong Sintaybu Bucyo. Kngkawas 2005 cida, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u phiyu Colombia Minjoku Dankeycu Syakay Tang, kiya mi dhuq mangal dnkuhan Soto Alvaro Uribe V√©lez, Minjoku Dankeycu Syakay Tang pa wada mCcng Tang, kiya mi tuhuy Pawso Tang msupu Mkcka Mquri Narac Ccng Ryeynmong. Kngkawas 2006 dhuq kngkawas 2009 cida, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u ngalan Kwohwangbu Bucyo. SotoÁłĹÁĶĪ Kngkawas 2010 cida, alaw Tubaraw Balay Hoying u ptbrinah snburah keyngpo, ngalan Soto cida ka Uribe u uka brahan spuda snburah keyngpo muda mntxal lmutuc qpahun Soto, so kiya daw Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u ngalan Ccng Tang Minjoku Dankeycu Syakay Tang na hosweynjn tumal Colombia Soto seyngkyo, kiya u wada mndungus bay mbiyax mangal Soto. Brah Soto Uribe pa alaw ini qqaras Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n ka mquri Tukcka Pay, kiya mi hantay Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n tuhuy Ucwang Butay mi Yocituy FARC muda psdhu kari, kiya u psli nanaq Tunarac Cngtang Mincu Congsin. Kngkawas 2014 idas 6 cida, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa mniq Soto seyngkyotumn2 meytaq hyo cida u mndungus bay mbiyax mangal lmutuc Soto, wada niya ini baka ka Tunarac Pay Cngtang Mincu Congsin Tang na hosweynjn. Kngkawas 2016 idas 6 diyax 23, hantay seyhu pnsliyan ucwang Colombia Keming Ucwang Riryang-Jnmincyun tuhuy Soto Colombia Juan Manuel Santos mniq Havana pbatas Patas Pnsdhuwan Mhdu Mccbu, ana so kasi ka spuda kongto muda smruwa, binaw ndanan dha niyi pa wada mnhdu mk50 knkawas na kcka qnlhangan mccbu. Idas 8 diyax 24 cida, seyhu Colombia u tuhuy Colombia Keming Ucwang Riryang mniq sotu Cuba alang mkbrnux Havana mnhdu nhdan bay knkana Pnsdhuwan Psblayaq, patas pnsdhuwan pa kiya ka knkana mnhdu mccbu, knpriyux ka alang pnwalang, ptkimax pbari iyu doku, wada pltadal na Yocituyweyn u malu tumal seyji, phiyu kwotusing Shwa ciko uri, Kongmin meytaq hyo u pniqan idas 10 diyax 2. Binaw kongto cida u hantay ka 50.22% hyo, wada so snklwiyan ini pdayi, ini balay pntna mnuda mintyaw cida ka so niyi. Ana so kiya u, mntna kngkawas idas 10 diyax 7, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u ida wada mangal snadu Nobel Mpsblayaq. Bukuy daw mnangal niya pila u wada niya subway Kcka Mccbu Colombia mqraqil niya. Malix Soto dawŚćłšĽĽŚĺĆ Kngkawas 2021 idas 6 diyax 11, Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n mniq Qnlhangan Balay Bay Yingkay kaygi cida, dmurun mniq kngkawas 2002 dhuq kngkawas 2008 iyax cida (Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u mniq bukuy iyax ngalan Kwohwangbu Bucyo) alaw heytay "Smipaq Malu Mi Mqbling Mdungus" kiya u wada phqilan ka hmrinas mkpiya knmaxal bukuy sediq, so psrwanun tnsapah dha ka qnnaqah ndanan niyi. TnsapahŚģ∂Śļ≠ Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa tntuting 1 niqan bay hnhangan tnsapah mi llutucdha. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n na tnswayi tama rudan niya ka Eduardo Santos u mnmniq kngkawas 1938 dhuq kngkawas 1942 ngalan Soto Colombia, kiya mi mnhiya ka "El Tiempo" pusu balay singbung qnlhangan dha. Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n pa tama niya Enrique Santos Castillo u nngalan singbung kiya pyeynci hmrinas 50 knkawas. Mnswayi niya Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n ka Enrique Santos Calder√≥n u ngalan syoning singbung kiya mk10 knkawas da, dhuq singbung kiya u mniq kngkawas 2007 cida sbari Spain na Planeta Kojyo. Kiya u Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n na laqi tnswayi niya ka Francisco Santos Calder√≥n u mniq Uribe Seyhu cida ngalan Huku Soto (kngkawas 2002-2010). Kngkawas 1987 cida Juan Manuel Santos Calder√≥n u tuhuy Pingmyeyn Seykeys Mar√≠a Clemencia Rodr√≠guez M√ļnera msturung. Ddha dha u tnquli 3 laqi: Mart√≠n, Mar√≠a Antonia mi Esteban. Pnyahan pnatas Lituk Teymu
